learning_path.title: AI-Enabled Martech Platform Strategy
learning_path.description: This learning path is designed for marketing technology professionals aiming to transition from implementing martech platforms to defining vision and strategy for AI-enabled platform products. The path focuses on building hands-on experience with LLM-powered solutions, leading AI feature development, and collaborating with engineering teams to deliver production-ready AI features.

chapters.title: Introduction to Hybrid Retrieval Techniques
learning_objectives: Identify the key components of hybrid retrieval systems.
Describe the differences between vector and keyword retrieval methods.
Explain the advantages of using hybrid retrieval in AI applications.

core_concepts.title: Vector Retrieval
core_concepts.content: Vector retrieval uses mathematical models to represent data as vectors in a multi-dimensional space, allowing for similarity-based searches.
examples: Using cosine similarity to find similar documents.
Applying vector embeddings in recommendation systems.

core_concepts.title: Keyword Retrieval
core_concepts.content: Keyword retrieval involves searching for documents based on specific terms or phrases, often using inverted index structures.
examples: Searching a database for documents containing 'AI marketing'.
Using Boolean operators to refine search results.

core_concepts.title: Hybrid Retrieval Systems
core_concepts.content: Hybrid retrieval systems combine vector and keyword methods to improve search accuracy and relevance.
examples: Integrating vector embeddings with keyword filters.
Using hybrid retrieval in chatbots to enhance response accuracy.

exercises.title: Hands-On: Implement a Simple Hybrid Retrieval System
exercises.description: Develop a basic hybrid retrieval system using Python and a small dataset.
instructions: Set up a Python environment with necessary libraries.
Create a small dataset of text documents.
Implement vector and keyword retrieval methods.
Combine both methods to form a hybrid retrieval system.
exercises.deliverable: A Python script implementing the hybrid retrieval system.

exercises.title: Reflection: Benefits of Hybrid Retrieval
exercises.description: Reflect on the potential benefits and challenges of implementing hybrid retrieval systems in marketing technology.
instructions: Consider the use cases of hybrid retrieval in martech.
Write a short paragraph on how hybrid retrieval can enhance customer experience.
exercises.deliverable: A reflection paragraph on hybrid retrieval benefits.

applied_project.project_title: Developing a Hybrid Search Feature for a Martech Platform
applied_project.project_description: Design and implement a hybrid search feature for a martech platform that enhances user search capabilities by integrating vector and keyword retrieval methods.
applied_project.deliverable: A documented prototype of the hybrid search feature.

self_assessment_questions.question: What is a key advantage of vector retrieval?
options: It is faster than keyword retrieval.

self_assessment_questions.question: Which method is typically used in keyword retrieval?
What is a hybrid retrieval system?
options: A system that uses only vector retrieval.
A system that combines vector and keyword retrieval.
A system that uses only keyword retrieval.
self_assessment_questions.answer: A system that combines vector and keyword retrieval.

chapters.industry_context: In the marketing technology industry, hybrid retrieval systems can significantly enhance the capabilities of platforms by providing more accurate and relevant search results. This is particularly useful in customer data platforms (CDPs) where understanding customer behavior and preferences is crucial.

resources.title: Understanding Hybrid Retrieval Systems in AI
resources.description: An in-depth article explaining the components and benefits of hybrid retrieval systems, focusing on vector and keyword methods.

resources.title: Hybrid Retrieval Techniques for AI Applications
resources.description: A comprehensive video tutorial that covers the basics of hybrid retrieval techniques, including practical examples.

resources.title: Building a Hybrid Retrieval System with Python
resources.description: A hands-on course teaching how to implement hybrid retrieval systems using Python, with a focus on marketing technology applications.

resources.title: Hybrid Retrieval Systems Documentation
resources.description: Official documentation on hybrid retrieval systems, including API references and integration guides.

resources.title: Practical Guide to Hybrid Retrieval in Marketing
resources.description: A practical guide tailored for marketing technology professionals, focusing on implementing hybrid retrieval systems in marketing applications.

chapters.title: Managing AI Feature Releases
learning_objectives: Describe the purpose of release gates in AI feature deployment.
Explain the process of implementing rollback strategies.
Identify key considerations for safe AI feature releases.

core_concepts.title: Release Gates
core_concepts.content: Release gates are checkpoints in the deployment process that ensure a feature meets specific criteria before moving to the next stage.
examples: Testing a feature in a staging environment before production.
Using user feedback as a gate for feature improvement.

core_concepts.title: Rollback Strategies
core_concepts.content: Rollback strategies are plans to revert a system to a previous state if a new feature causes issues.
examples: Using version control to revert code changes.
Implementing feature flags to disable problematic features.

core_concepts.title: Safe Deployment Practices
core_concepts.content: Safe deployment practices involve strategies to minimize risk during feature releases, such as gradual rollouts and monitoring.
examples: Deploying features to a small user segment first.
Monitoring system performance post-deployment.

exercises.title: Hands-On: Implement a Feature Rollback
exercises.description: Simulate a feature deployment and implement a rollback strategy using a version control system.
instructions: Set up a version control repository.
Deploy a simple feature to a test environment.
Simulate an issue and perform a rollback.
exercises.deliverable: A documented rollback process using version control.

exercises.title: Reflection: Importance of Release Gates
exercises.description: Reflect on the role of release gates in ensuring successful AI feature deployments.
instructions: Consider the potential risks of skipping release gates.
Write a short paragraph on how release gates can improve feature quality.
exercises.deliverable: A reflection paragraph on release gates.

applied_project.project_title: Designing a Release Strategy for AI Features
applied_project.project_description: Create a comprehensive release strategy for deploying AI features, including release gates and rollback plans.

self_assessment_questions.question: What is the primary purpose of release gates?
options: To ensure features meet criteria before release.
To eliminate the need for testing.
self_assessment_questions.answer: To ensure features meet criteria before release.

self_assessment_questions.question: Which of the following is a rollback strategy?
Why are safe deployment practices important?
options: They reduce the need for testing.
They speed up the deployment process.

chapters.industry_context: In the fast-paced martech industry, managing AI feature releases effectively is crucial to maintaining platform stability and user satisfaction. Release gates and rollback strategies help ensure that new features enhance the platform without introducing disruptions.

resources.title: Understanding Release Gates in AI Deployments
resources.description: An article that explains the purpose and implementation of release gates in AI feature deployment, with a focus on marketing technology applications.

resources.title: AI Feature Rollback Strategies
resources.description: A video tutorial that covers various rollback strategies for AI features, including practical examples and industry-specific considerations for Martech.

resources.title: Implementing Safe AI Feature Releases
resources.description: An interactive course that provides hands-on experience with managing AI feature releases, focusing on safe deployment practices and rollback strategies.

resources.title: OpenAI API Documentation: Deployment Best Practices
resources.description: Official documentation from OpenAI that outlines best practices for deploying AI features, including release gates and rollback procedures.

resources.title: Practical Guide to AI Release Management in Martech
resources.description: A tutorial specifically tailored for the marketing technology industry, providing practical insights and tools for managing AI feature releases effectively.

chapters.title: Defining and Validating AI Tools
learning_objectives: Apply techniques to define AI tools for specific marketing use cases.
Implement validation processes to ensure tool effectiveness.
Compare different AI tools based on performance metrics.

core_concepts.title: AI Tool Definition
core_concepts.content: Defining AI tools involves specifying their purpose, functionality, and the problems they aim to solve.
examples: Creating a chatbot for customer support.
Developing a recommendation engine for personalized marketing.

core_concepts.title: Tool Validation
core_concepts.content: Validation ensures that AI tools perform as expected and meet predefined criteria for success.
examples: Testing a tool's accuracy with a validation dataset.
Conducting user acceptance testing for a new feature.

core_concepts.title: Performance Metrics
core_concepts.content: Performance metrics are used to evaluate the effectiveness of AI tools, such as accuracy, precision, and recall.
examples: Measuring the precision of a recommendation engine.
Evaluating the recall of a sentiment analysis tool.

exercises.title: Hands-On: Define and Validate an AI Tool
exercises.description: Define an AI tool for a marketing use case and implement a basic validation process.
instructions: Select a marketing use case for the AI tool.
Define the tool's purpose and functionality.
Create a simple validation plan to test the tool.
exercises.deliverable: A document outlining the tool definition and validation plan.

exercises.title: Reflection: Evaluating AI Tool Performance
exercises.description: Reflect on the importance of performance metrics in evaluating AI tools.
instructions: Consider how performance metrics can guide tool improvements.
Write a short paragraph on the role of metrics in tool validation.
exercises.deliverable: A reflection paragraph on performance metrics.

applied_project.project_title: Developing and Validating a Marketing AI Tool
applied_project.project_description: Create an AI tool for a specific marketing application and validate its performance using industry-standard metrics.
applied_project.deliverable: A validated AI tool with performance metrics report.

self_assessment_questions.question: What is the first step in defining an AI tool?
Which metric is used to evaluate the accuracy of an AI tool?
Why is validation important for AI tools?
options: To ensure tools are developed quickly
To confirm tools meet success criteria
self_assessment_questions.answer: To confirm tools meet success criteria

chapters.industry_context: In martech, defining and validating AI tools is essential for creating solutions that effectively address marketing challenges. By ensuring tools are well-defined and validated, companies can enhance their marketing strategies and improve customer engagement.

resources.title: Defining AI Tools for Marketing: A Comprehensive Guide
resources.description: An in-depth article on defining AI tools specifically for marketing use cases, including practical examples and case studies.

resources.title: Validating AI Tools for Marketing Effectiveness
resources.description: A video tutorial on implementing validation processes to ensure the effectiveness of AI tools in marketing, with real-world examples.

resources.title: AI Tool Validation and Performance Metrics
resources.description: An interactive course that covers techniques for validating AI tools and comparing them based on performance metrics, tailored for marketing professionals.

resources.title: Hugging Face Transformers Documentation
resources.description: Official documentation for Hugging Face Transformers, useful for understanding tool definitions and validation in AI applications.

resources.title: Hands-On Tutorial: Building and Validating AI Tools for Marketing
resources.description: A hands-on tutorial that guides you through building and validating AI tools specifically for marketing applications.

chapters.title: Designing Secure AI Agent Permissions
learning_objectives: Analyze the security requirements for AI agent permissions.
Design permission frameworks for AI agents in marketing platforms.
Evaluate the effectiveness of permission systems in protecting data.

core_concepts.title: AI Agent Permissions
core_concepts.content: AI agent permissions define the actions an agent can perform and the data it can access, ensuring security and compliance.
examples: Restricting data access for a customer service bot.
Defining read-only permissions for analytics tools.

core_concepts.title: Permission Frameworks
core_concepts.content: Permission frameworks provide structured approaches to managing and enforcing permissions for AI agents.
examples: Role-based access control (RBAC) systems.
Attribute-based access control (ABAC) models.

core_concepts.title: Data Protection
core_concepts.content: Data protection involves securing sensitive information from unauthorized access and ensuring compliance with regulations.
examples: Encrypting data at rest and in transit.
Implementing audit logs for data access.

exercises.title: Hands-On: Design an AI Agent Permission System
exercises.description: Create a permission system for an AI agent in a marketing platform, focusing on security and compliance.
instructions: Identify the data and actions the AI agent will handle.
Design a permission framework using RBAC or ABAC.
Implement basic security measures to protect data.
exercises.deliverable: A documented permission system design with security measures.

exercises.title: Reflection: Challenges in Designing Permissions
exercises.description: Reflect on the challenges faced when designing permission systems for AI agents.
instructions: Consider the balance between security and usability.
Write a short paragraph on potential challenges and solutions.
exercises.deliverable: A reflection paragraph on permission design challenges.

applied_project.project_title: Implementing Secure Permissions for AI Agents
applied_project.project_description: Design and implement a secure permission system for AI agents in a martech platform, ensuring data protection and compliance.
applied_project.deliverable: A comprehensive permission system with documentation.

self_assessment_questions.question: What is the purpose of AI agent permissions?
options: To define actions and data access
self_assessment_questions.answer: To define actions and data access

self_assessment_questions.question: Which framework is commonly used for permission management?
Why is data protection important in AI systems?

chapters.industry_context: In the marketing technology sector, designing secure AI agent permissions is critical for protecting customer data and ensuring compliance with privacy regulations. Effective permission systems help maintain trust and security in AI-driven marketing solutions.

resources.title: Designing Secure AI Systems: Permission Frameworks
resources.description: An in-depth article on designing secure AI systems with a focus on permission frameworks, particularly for marketing technology platforms.

resources.title: AI Agent Permissions: A Practical Guide
resources.description: This course provides a hands-on approach to designing and evaluating AI agent permissions, with practical examples in marketing technology.

resources.title: Secure AI Agent Permissions in Marketing Platforms
resources.description: A video tutorial that explores secure AI agent permissions specifically within marketing technology platforms.

resources.title: Anthropic's Guide to AI Agent Security
resources.description: Official documentation from Anthropic on AI agent security, including best practices for designing permission systems.

summary.profile_summary: Laura G is a Martech Platform Product Manager with 8 years of experience in marketing technology, focusing on implementing martech platforms like Salesforce Marketing Cloud and CDPs. She leads advanced feature launches, manages platform roadmaps, and uses GenAI tools for content generation and workflow automation.
summary.target_role: Define and implement AI-enabled marketing technology products
recommendations: Start with foundational skills like Hybrid retrieval (vector + keyword) and Tool definitions & validation to build core understanding before tackling advanced topics.
Your path focuses on progressing from Aware to User proficiency across 4 chapters. Complete them in order for best results.

Your path covers 4 skill domains: Retrieval & RAG Systems, Evaluation & Observability, Agents & Orchestration, Safety & Security. This breadth ensures a well-rounded AI skill set for your target role.
